examples: It became fashionable to eat certain kinds of fish.
Such thinking is fashionable among right-wing politicians.
All shades of mauve, lilac, lavender and purple were fashionable.
At the time, hats made of felted beaver fur were much desired by fashionable European gentlemen.
Chic, fashionable, wine-loving Paris, with its grand architecture and wide boulevards is likely the city of your dreams.
